07_gpt2_story_en.name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
07_gpt2_story_en.story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl planting a tree with a bunny nearby. The main character was girl and boy, girl is drawing on stump in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:


 1) Girl plants flower at first but can't get fruit because the flowers are not big enough for her to grab them; 2), As she starts growing more trees later gets frustrated that no one notices what she does best – collecting little ones' seeds 3). To make things worse - She has never done it before 4.) While gathering seedlings from bush (in between walking through town streets every day)- Woman accidentally drops two leaves while trying drop some pollen into plant 5 ). When asked why did he do this… It turns out his friend had given him 10 packets containing pink-ish stuff 7 ) Man then gives each packet as gift 8 ); Boy decides when they need better crops 9 ), He buys all these new crop which turned out OK until summer came around after rainstorm 11 ). And finally... All girls want berries so boys eat lots! So now Girls grow up looking like rabbits.. or something? Or maybe just cute animals?? That would be fun :)

08_nllb_translation_ko.name: NLLB 영한 번역
08_nllb_translation_ko.story_final: 한 때, 한 어린이의 그림이 있었습니다. 한 소녀가 근처에 토끼와 함께 나무를 심는 것을 어린이들의 그림으로 그려졌습니다. 주인공 인물은 소녀와 소년이었습니다. 소녀는 공원에서 줄기 위에 그림을 그리고 있었습니다. 분위기는 행복했습니다. 이야기는 시작됩니다: 1) 소녀가 처음에는 꽃을 심지만 꽃이 충분히 크지 않아 열매를 맺지 못하기 때문에 꽃을 심지만 꽃을 피우지 않습니다. 2) 더 많은 나무를 자라는 것을 시작하면 나중에 아무도 그녀가 가장 잘하는 것을 알아차리지 않는다는 것을 좌절합니다. 3) 작은 토끼의 씨앗을 수집합니다.

vision.raw_caption: a children ' s drawing of a girl planting a tree with a bunny nearby

story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl planting a tree with a bunny nearby. The main character was girl and boy, girl is drawing on stump in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:


 1) Girl plants flower at first but can't get fruit because the flowers are not big enough for her to grab them; 2), As she starts growing more trees later gets frustrated that no one notices what she does best – collecting little ones' seeds 3). To make things worse - She has never done it before 4.) While gathering seedlings from bush (in between walking through town streets every day)- Woman accidentally drops two leaves while trying drop some pollen into plant 5 ). When asked why did he do this… It turns out his friend had given him 10 packets containing pink-ish stuff 7 ) Man then gives each packet as gift 8 ); Boy decides when they need better crops 9 ), He buys all these new crop which turned out OK until summer came around after rainstorm 11 ). And finally... All girls want berries so boys eat lots! So now Girls grow up looking like rabbits.. or something? Or maybe just cute animals?? That would be fun :)
story_final: 한 때, 한 어린이의 그림이 있었습니다. 한 소녀가 근처에 토끼와 함께 나무를 심는 것을 어린이들의 그림으로 그려졌습니다. 주인공 인물은 소녀와 소년이었습니다. 소녀는 공원에서 줄기 위에 그림을 그리고 있었습니다. 분위기는 행복했습니다. 이야기는 시작됩니다: 1) 소녀가 처음에는 꽃을 심지만 꽃이 충분히 크지 않아 열매를 맺지 못하기 때문에 꽃을 심지만 꽃을 피우지 않습니다. 2) 더 많은 나무를 자라는 것을 시작하면 나중에 아무도 그녀가 가장 잘하는 것을 알아차리지 않는다는 것을 좌절합니다. 3) 작은 토끼의 씨앗을 수집합니다.
